Vulnerabilities.Title: zlib heap buffer overflow
Vulnerabilities.Description: zlib through 1.2.12 has a heap-based buffer over-read or buffer overflow in inflate in inflate.c via a large gzip header extra field.

Vulnerabilities.Title: OpenSSL X.400 address type confusion
Vulnerabilities.Description: There is a type confusion vulnerability relating to X.400 address processing inside an X.509 GeneralName in OpenSSL.

Vulnerabilities.Title: xz-utils unsafe race during xzgrep
Vulnerabilities.Description: An arbitrary file write vulnerability was found in GNU gzip's zgrep utility.

Vulnerabilities.Title: requests cross-origin authentication redirect
Vulnerabilities.Description: The requests library sends an HTTP Authorization header to an http URI upon receiving a same-hostname https-to-http redirect.
